# Support

Need help? Our support surface is **observable-by-default** and available across
our region.

---

## Getting Help

| Channel | Use For | SLA |
|---------|---------|-----|
| 🐛 [Issues](../../issues) | Bugs and service proposals | Triaged within one business day |
| 💬 [Discussions](../../discussions) | Questions and architecture debates | Best effort |
| 🌐 [srvcs.cloud](https://srvcs.cloud) | Everything else | Available continuously |

Please search existing issues before opening a new one. Duplicate reports are
consolidated and closed.

---

## Status

```
us-east-1
```

Operational status is reported per region. Incidents are tracked through to
resolution and followed by a retrospective.
